article.title: Microsoft Offer and BGV Query
article.content:
Hi all,

I have received an offer from Microsoft and they have initited my BGV.
I wanted to know do we get appointment letter which has joining date after BGV is completed?

Also my notice period is 90 days, but I have mentioned 45 days to get the interviews. Shall I resign now itself or should I wait for the appointment letter to come and then resign?

post.content: What documents do they ask for BGV?
@OP\nCongrats.\nAfter having final round of interview how long recruiter took to share the positive result?
Yes you will get AL after BGV only.\nRecruiter mentioned that DOJ will be decided by me and HM, mutually.
What is the position you got offer for ?

Yes, you will get the appointment letter only post BGV. Also, you should discuss the 90 days NP with your recruiter. Since you have already cleared all the rounds and they want to move ahead with you, they might guide you in this scenario.
what\'s the offer break up, offered level and YOE?
